title: Over The Limits for Female Gender Mod
description: Allows you to go over the default limits for Female Gender Mod
body:
It allows you to set limits outside of the allowed ones from the [Female Gender Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/female-gender)

Similar to [Female Plastic Surgery: Bust Limit Tweaker](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/female-plastic-surgery-bust-limit-tweaker) but for *1.21.11*, if you need anything below 1.21.11, you might not use this mod

This also comes with a patch for the cape for not throwing it on logs for versions not newer then 5.0.0 Beta 3 (for the domain it tries to reach is dead)

# Configuration files

- `config\boobaoverlimit\boobs_limits.json` allows you to change what type of limits for the types of things inside of the customization menu, changing any will *require a game reboot* (Breast, Sep, Voice Pitch, etc)
- `config\boobaoverlimit\mod_config.json` should the mod be just enabled or not *(requires a reboot)*
- `config\FemaleGenderMod\local_overrides\<uuid>.json` stores anything past the limits and loads them, so it persists on reboots (any value, or the entire file is deleted if a config is within the normal values)
